title: Create: Biomes O Plenty Casings
description: Datapack that adds recipes to allow Biomes O Plenty Stripped Logs / Wood to be used to craft Andesite/Brass/Copper Casings
body:
### 🌲✨ Create x Biomes O' Plenty Compatibility Datapack ✨🌲
### 
Welcome to a seamless crafting experience! This datapack bridges a gap between the Create Mod and Biomes O' Plenty, making your modded Minecraft world even more cohesive and enjoyable.

With this pack installed, you'll be able to use the beautiful and diverse logs from Biomes O' Plenty to craft casings from the Create Mod, just like you would with vanilla wood! No more limitations when automating or decorating with your favorite wood types.

Whether you're building intricate contraptions or immersive environments, this compatibility datapack ensures your creative vision isn't held back. Simple, intuitive, and fully integrated. Just how modded Minecraft should be.

🔧 No configs, no fuss. Drop it in and go!

![andesite casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747b2efff98ffc49f3d3a190a7c436dfa5a0a13f.png)

![brass casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcfb0b3f8f0f91feb841bafd051b83a025f26f79.png)

![copper casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c66c30931eb6782f8295c7513fad7901e2f89d.png)
